productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Women Renewal Black Shoes
description: The adidas Renewal athletic shoe is a great everyday wear shoe that combines style with comfort. The go-to appeal of this pair has made it one of the most popular adidas shoes. Wear this for your morning jog, a walk in the park, and it also doubles as a lightweight casual sneaker!UpperLeather upper with synthetic overlaysadidas 3-Stripe overlays at the midfoot regionPadded fabric innerReinforced overlay at the heel collarCentral lace-upsPadded tongue with brandingUpper adhered to the outsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with patterned grooves and strategically placed rubber cleatsBranding at the midfoot area od the outsoleOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
